title: FX Volatility Dashboard
excerpt: Interactive dashboard showing realized vs implied volatility across G10 FX. Built with Plotly Dash and deployed on GCP.

title: NLP on Earnings Calls
excerpt: Exploratory analysis applying transformer models to extract sentiment and themes from quarterly earnings transcripts.

title: Portfolio Backtester (mini)
excerpt: A lightweight backtester for rule-based strategies with walk-forward evaluation and simple transaction cost model.
